heading: Election by Indian tribes
label: 20929 Election by Indian tribes
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 111–131) of title I of , , , which is classified principally to this part. For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 591July 27, 2006
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 16927 of Title 42

For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 591July 27, 2006

children.label: A
children.text: elect to carry out this part as a jurisdiction subject to its provisions; or

children.label: B
children.text: elect to delegate its functions under this part to another jurisdiction or jurisdictions within which the territory of the tribe is located and to provide access to its territory and such other cooperation and assistance as may be needed to enable such other jurisdiction or jurisdictions to carry out and enforce the requirements of this part.

children.label: A
children.text: it is a tribe subject to the law enforcement jurisdiction of a State under ;section 1162 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: the tribe does not make an election under paragraph (1) within 1 year of or rescinds an election under paragraph (1)(A); orJuly 27, 2006

children.label: C
children.text: the Attorney General determines that the tribe has not substantially implemented the requirements of this part and is not likely to become capable of doing so within a reasonable amount of time.

children.heading: Cooperation between tribal authorities and other jurisdictions
children.label: b Cooperation between tribal authorities and other jurisdictions

children.heading: Nonduplication
children.label: 1 Nonduplication
children.text: A tribe subject to this part is not required to duplicate functions under this part which are fully carried out by another jurisdiction or jurisdictions within which the territory of the tribe is located.

children.label: A
children.text: arrange for the tribe to carry out any function of such a jurisdiction under this part with respect to sex offenders subject to the tribe’s jurisdiction; and

children.label: B
children.text: arrange for such a jurisdiction to carry out any function of the tribe under this part with respect to sex offenders subject to the tribe’s jurisdiction.
